column1: Place your Power BI screenshots here. Recommended filenames:
These are referenced from the main README. Use 16:9 ratio screenshots at ~1920×1080 for best display.
### Tip for taking good screenshots in Power BI:
1. Maximize the Power BI window (F11 fullscreen if needed)
2. Use the **Export → Export to PDF** option
3. Or use Windows Snipping Tool (Win+Shift+S) on each dashboard page
4. Save as PNG (better quality than JPG for dashboards with text)
